MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher O'Connell, Esq., of Law Offices of Gino J. Molinari, Tel. 415.863.3767, appearing for plaintiff and moving party.

No other Appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MELVIN CABALLERO Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
